name: hourly-health-check
prompt: Run `hermes doctor`. If anything is unhealthy, summarize the issues in three lines or fewer. If everything is healthy, reply with the single word 'OK'.

name: daily-wiki-digest
prompt: Look at /home/machine/.hermes/MEMORY.md and any wiki content available locally. Summarize the most important pieces of context I should keep in active memory today in 5 bullets or fewer. Update MEMORY.md only if you find a new pattern worth saving.

name: weekly-skill-audit
prompt: Audit my skills folder at ~/.hermes/skills. For each skill, verify the description still matches the body. Flag any skills that are stale, duplicated, or drift from their declared description. Output a JSON array of {name, issue} entries; empty array if all clean.

name: nightly-memory-consolidation
prompt: Read MEMORY.md and USER.md. Consolidate redundant entries, merge similar facts, and prune anything stale. Keep both files within their character limits (2200 / 1375). Do not invent new facts; only reorganize what already exists.
